---
title: "Quantitative Text Analysis"
author: "Kostas Gemenis & Bastiaan Bruinsma"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
bibliography: [library.bib]
description: This is the book for the Quantitative Text Analysis course.
documentclass: book
link-citations: yes
site: bookdown::bookdown_site
biblio-style: apalike
---

# Foreword {-#Foreword}
Welcome to the online version of the exercises and slides for the Quantitative Text Analysis course. Please note that this book is constantly being updated. If you have any suggestions or comments, please contact us via: bruinsma@soz.uni-frankfurt.de
